CustomField.description: Price per Watt: Total Price (after line-item discounts) divided by total project wattage in watts (Design Revision Project Wattage (kW) * 1000). Matches the PDF dollar-per-watt calculation.
CustomField.formula: IF( OR( ISBLANK(Design_Revision__r.Project_Wattage_kW__c), Design_Revision__r.Project_Wattage_kW__c = 0, ISBLANK(TotalPrice), TotalPrice = 0 ), NULL, TotalPrice / (Design_Revision__r.Project_Wattage_kW__c * 1000) )
CustomField.label: Price Per Watt
